primary_sources.source_name: Indian Hotels Company (IHCL/Taj) FY25 Annual Report (BSE: 500850)
primary_sources.notes: Revenue ~₹7,200 Cr. Employee costs ~₹1,900 Cr (26.4%), Food & beverage costs ~₹1,300 Cr (18%), Utilities ~₹860 Cr (12%), Rent ~₹500 Cr (6.9%).

primary_sources.source_name: Lemon Tree Hotels FY25 Annual Report (BSE: 541233)
primary_sources.notes: Revenue ~₹1,800 Cr. Employee costs ~28%, Utilities ~12%, Food & beverage ~15%.

primary_sources.source_name: EIH Limited (Oberoi Hotels) FY25 Annual Report (BSE: 500840)
primary_sources.notes: Revenue ~₹3,200 Cr. Employee costs ~28%, Utilities ~10%, Food & beverage ~16%.

primary_sources.source_name: Federation of Hotel & Restaurant Associations of India (FHRAI) India Hotel Industry Survey 2024
primary_sources.notes: India hotel industry cost structure: employee 25-32% of revenue, F&B 15-22%, utilities 10-14%, rent 5-12%.
RevPAR, occupancy benchmarks for India hotel segments (luxury, upper-upscale, upscale, midscale, economy).

source_metadata.methodology: P25/P50/P75 derived from FY24-25 annual reports of 3 India-listed hotel companies (IHCL, Lemon Tree, EIH). FHRAI survey 2024 used for broader industry validation. Categories as % of total revenue. P25 reflects luxury properties with premium RevPAR and lean staffing model; P90 reflects economy or struggling properties.

HR.source_note: Employee costs % of revenue. IHCL FY25: 26.4%, Lemon Tree FY25: ~28%, EIH FY25: ~28%. FHRAI Survey 2024: luxury 24-28%, economy 30-40%.

POWER_ENERGY.source_note: Energy and utilities (electricity, gas, water). IHCL FY25: ~12%, Lemon Tree: ~12%, EIH: ~10%. FHRAI: 10-14% industry range. Energy is second-largest variable cost after labour.

OUTSOURCED.source_note: Food & beverage and housekeeping supplies (F&B is major variable cost). IHCL FY25 F&B costs: ~18%, Lemon Tree: ~15%. Note: F&B cost is distinct from F&B revenue.

FACILITIES.source_note: Rent, lease, occupancy (Ind AS 116 adjusted). IHCL FY25 rent: ~7%, Lemon Tree: ~10% (sale-leaseback properties). Owned properties: 4-6%, leased: 10-18%.

MARKETING.source_note: Sales, marketing, OTA commissions, loyalty programme. IHCL: ~5% (includes OTA fees). FHRAI: OTA commissions 12-18% of OTA-sourced revenue; blended 4-8%.

PLANT_MAINTENANCE.source_note: Repairs, maintenance, refurbishment. FHRAI: hotels spend 2-4% of revenue on maintenance to maintain brand standards. Ageing properties higher.

IT.source_note: PMS, CRS, revenue management systems. Gartner Hospitality IT 2024: luxury hotels 1.5-2.5% of revenue, economy 0.5-1%.

INSURANCE.source_note: Property, liability, event cancellation insurance. INTERNAL_CALIBRATION.
